css: /* Main container for the entire page */
max-width: 1200px; /* Limit the max-width for large screens */
padding: 20px; /* Add padding around the page */
flex-wrap: wrap; /* Ensure that blocks wrap on smaller screens */
flex: 1 1 calc(33.333% - 40px); /* Flex basis to take up 1/3 of the width with margin */
max-width: 400px; /* Limit block size on larger screens */
min-width: 280px; /* Ensure minimum block size for smaller screens */
flex: 1 1 calc(50% - 40px); /* On medium screens, each block takes 50% width */
flex: 1 1 calc(100% - 40px); /* On smaller screens, each block takes full width */
margin: 10px; /* Reduce margin for very small screens */
